chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 635 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 12.10.2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for Respondents 4 to 6/SMC Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for Respondents No.4 to 6 has filed a statement, which his taken on record. He submits that the remaining entire pensionary benefits amounting to Rs.3,57,413/- will be paid to the petitioner in next two months. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of this petition in the above terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI
